query: Can you assist in crafting a travel schedule departing from Richmond and traveling to 2 cities in Tennessee? The journey will last 5 days, starting on March 5th and concluding on March 9th, 2022. The travel budget is set at $2,600.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Richmond to Nashville, duration: 9 hours 3 mins, distance: 989 km, cost: 49

plan.attraction: Country Music Hall of Fame and Museum; Johnny Cash Museum; Grand Ole Opry;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house

plan.attraction: Belle Meade Historic Site & Winery; Musicians Hall of Fame and Museum; Ryman Auditorium;
plan.accommodation: Clean and large bedroom in a private house

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Nashville to Knoxville, duration: 2 hours 42 mins, distance: 290 km, cost: 14
plan.attraction: World's Fair Park; Sunsphere; Knoxville Museum of Art;
plan.accommodation: Cozy Private Room in Chinatown/ Lower East Side
